_publications._publicationTitle: Feasibility of magnetic resonance-guided high-intensity focused ultrasound treatment targeting distinct nodular lesions in neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: Following, volumetric analysis and treatment planning, 30 lesions (25%) met criteria for complete ablation and 33 lesions (27.5%) met criteria for partial >50% ablation
details: Successfully performed volumetric analysis and treatment planning for 120 distinct nodular lesions, enabling determination that 30 lesions (25%) met criteria for complete ablation and 33 lesions (27.5%) met criteria for partial >50% ablation
